title: stachys recta subsp. recta
intro: Stachys recta subsp. recta, commonly known as upright betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of upright betony include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate anxiety and stress, and even help in treating wounds and skin conditions. Upright betony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
